## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / perf
- [ ] Docs / website

## Checklist

- [ ] `./build.sh` compiles cleanly with no new warnings
- [ ] Tested on macOS 14+ (mention chip)
- [ ] No per-tile shadows / no scroll-lag regressions
- [ ] No telemetry/analytics/accounts added
- [ ] Screenshots or GIFs for UI changes (below)
